TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Jovenel_MoΟ·se, title = Jovenel_MoΟ·se, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jovenel_MoΟ·se} }

S.FORM: Jovenel MoΟ·se I 1968 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 26 a romi'ad masofoc ci Jovenel MoΟ·se, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Haiti anini i ci Jovenel MoΟ·se, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: *o~ub~v…ôn…ô…Ψ mo~u*s…ô i **** a miΡß…ô Πa saka * fo~u…Ψa…§~…° saka ** a ro~umi Γa…§~…° maso~ufo~u Π Πi *o~ub~v…ôn…ô…Ψ mo~u*s…ô, ma…Ψamiko~umo~u…§~…°aj a tam…§~…°aw. o~u sawara Γan no~u kitakit no~u Ρßaiti anini i Πi *o~ub~v…ôn…ô…Ψ mo~u*s…ô, patir…ô≈΄an a ro~umi Γa…§~…° i **** a miΡß…ô Πa saka * fo~u…Ψa…§~…° saka * a ro~umi Γa…§~…°.
S.FORM: Jovenel MoΟ·se I 1968 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 26 a romi'ad masofoc ci Jovenel MoΟ·se, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Haiti anini i ci Jovenel MoΟ·se, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
